title: pelargonium × incurvum
intro: Pelargonium × incurvum, also known as the Barberton daisy or Cape geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross between Pelargonium inflatum and Pelargonium muricatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Pelargonium × incurvum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Pelargonium × incurvum is often used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional medicine practices to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
